title: PromptComposition
description: Declares the three-region prompt layout: static-system / static-context / dynamic-suffix (FR-001, FR-002, FR-003). Only static regions carry cache_control.

static_system_block.description: System instructions + CLAUDE.md + tool definitions. cache_control=ephemeral.

static_context_block.description: Heavy repo context (files, shared docs). cache_control=ephemeral.

dynamic_suffix_block.description: User turn, timestamps, volatile values. NEVER cache_control.
